hero.title: We dress your team, your walls and your storefront.
hero.subtitle: Custom apparel, printed materials and signage — one single workshop in Alsace, France. You approve the proof before we start production.

catalogueCategory.empty.default.title: {label}: selection in the works
catalogueCategory.empty.goodies.body: Mugs, water bottles, tote bags: we're putting together a selection that lives up to HM Global quality. Need something urgently? Request a quote.
catalogueCategory.empty.default.body: Our selection is on its way. Need something urgently? Request a custom quote.
catalogueCategory.meta.tshirts.label: Custom t-shirts
catalogueCategory.meta.tshirts.descripti: Custom t-shirts in DTF, Flex or embroidery. Men's, women's and unisex fits — from lightweight cotton to premium heavyweight. Fast delivery.
catalogueCategory.meta.polos.label: Custom polo shirts
catalogueCategory.meta.polos.description: Custom polo shirts in Flex or embroidery. Entry-level jersey, long sleeves, classic piqué. Perfect for hospitality, food service and retail.
catalogueCategory.meta.hoodies.label: Custom hoodies & sweatshirts
catalogueCategory.meta.hoodies.descripti: Custom hoodies and sweatshirts. Soft brushed-fleece lining, professional quality. From €39.90.
catalogueCategory.meta.softshells.label: Custom softshells & jackets
catalogueCategory.meta.softshells.descri: Custom jackets and softshells. Premium embroidery recommended for a durable corporate finish.
catalogueCategory.meta.casquettes.label: Custom caps
catalogueCategory.meta.casquettes.descri: Made-to-measure embroidered caps. Heavy cotton, vintage and contrast-sandwich styles. Embroidery only, for a durable premium result.
catalogueCategory.meta.sacs.label: Custom bags & tote bags
catalogueCategory.meta.sacs.description: Tote bags and organic cotton bags customized in DTF or Flex. Ideal for events, associations and shops.
catalogueCategory.meta.goodies.label: Custom mugs & goodies
catalogueCategory.meta.goodies.descripti: Mugs and promotional items customized with your logo. Full-color sublimation printing. Ideal for seminars, corporate gifts and events.
cataloguePage.hero.subtitle: Pick your product, set up your branding and order directly online. Free delivery from 10 pieces.

contactPage.hero.title: Let's talk about your custom apparel, visual or made-to-measure project.
contactPage.hero.description: HM Global Agence supports companies, associations and teams who want a consistent, visible and well-produced brand identity. We work both as a creative agency and as a production workshop.

contactPage.social.title: Social media
engagements.hero.title: An agency rooted in Alsace, open to Europe.
engagements.hero.intro: HM Global is more than a production workshop. We believe in a craft that is passed on, in a region built together with its businesses, and in encounters that reach beyond our walls. Our involvement in Erasmus exchanges and our commitment to local production are the concrete expression of this.
engagements.stats.students.label: students welcomed
engagements.stats.students.sub: as part of exchanges with Turkey
engagements.stats.program.label: European programme
engagements.stats.local.label: local workshop
engagements.stats.human.label: direct support
engagements.values.local.title: Local roots
engagements.values.local.text: Production carried out in our workshop in Alsace, as close as possible to the businesses, associations and organisations we support.
engagements.values.europe.title: European openness
engagements.values.europe.text: Taking part in Erasmus exchanges means bringing to life real encounters between young people, cultures and know-how beyond borders.
engagements.values.transmission.title: Transmission
engagements.values.transmission.text: Welcoming people, explaining our craft, showing a real workshop: transmission is part of how we work.
engagements.values.responsible.title: Responsible production
engagements.values.responsible.text: Advising the right technique, preparing clean files and producing accurately: less waste, items that last.
engagements.erasmus.title: Our Erasmus commitment
engagements.erasmus.p1a: As part of European exchanges, we have welcomed
engagements.erasmus.p1b: , to help them discover a craft, a workshop and a way of working. These moments go far beyond production: they create bonds, open up perspectives and give meaning to what we do.
engagements.erasmus.p2: For HM Global, taking part in Erasmus means making real an exchange between young people, cultures and know-how — and showing that a local business can be part of a European dynamic.
engagements.reasons.title: Why it matters
engagements.reasons.item1: Passing on real know-how, in a workshop that produces every day.
engagements.reasons.item2: Bringing to life encounters between young people from several countries.
engagements.reasons.item3: Showing that a locally rooted SME can open up to Europe.
engagements.reasons.item4: Giving meaning to the craft beyond the simple order.
engagements.valuesSection.title: What guides our work
engagements.cta.title: Let's work together on your project
engagements.cta.text: Whether you are a business, an association or a public body, HM Global supports you with the same standards: advice, file preparation and carefully crafted local production.
entreprises.hero.title: Solutions built around the reality of your teams, not generic talk.
entreprises.hero.subtitle: HM Global works with organizations that have concrete needs: kitting out a team, making an activity more visible, unifying a look, preparing an event, or setting up professional apparel that lasts.
entreprises.common.heading: What comes up most often
entreprises.common.req1: Kitting out a worksite crew or field staff
entreprises.common.req2: Creating a consistent outfit for a restaurant, shop or SME
entreprises.common.req3: Preparing apparel for an association, club or event
entreprises.common.req4: Launching a corporate apparel range with restock options
entreprises.sectors.heading: Every sector has its real needs and the right products.
entreprises.sectors.intro: Product and technique aren't chosen the same way for a restaurant, a worksite crew, an association or an SME. The goal is a solution that's easy to use, consistent and built to last.
entreprises.sectors.btp.label: Construction
entreprises.sectors.btp.need1: Clear, hard-wearing outfits for worksite crews
entreprises.sectors.btp.need3: Easy restock on the same references
entreprises.sectors.btp.techniques: Flex for simple marking, embroidery on softshells, DTF depending on the artwork
entreprises.sectors.btp.path: Catalog if the need is well-defined. Quote if several teams, sizes or field uses are involved.
entreprises.sectors.restauration.label: Food service
entreprises.sectors.restauration.need1: Consistent outfits for front-of-house and kitchen staff
entreprises.sectors.restauration.need2: A cleaner, more recognizable image for customers
entreprises.sectors.restauration.product: T-shirts, sweatshirts, hoodies, polos or jackets depending on the setting
entreprises.sectors.restauration.techniq: Embroidery for a premium image, DTF if the logo has multiple colors
entreprises.sectors.restauration.path: Catalog for simple runs. Quote for a full outfit, a logo to rework or a recurring need.
entreprises.sectors.associations.label: Associations
entreprises.sectors.associations.need1: Small or medium runs for clubs, committees or volunteers
entreprises.sectors.associations.need2: A controlled budget with a clean result
entreprises.sectors.associations.need3: Apparel suited to events, members or organizers
entreprises.sectors.associations.techniq: DTF for detailed artwork, Flex for names and simple marking
entreprises.sectors.associations.path: Catalog for standard needs. Quote for a product mix, varying quantities or a specific event.
entreprises.sectors.evenements.label: Events
entreprises.sectors.evenements.need1: Kitting out a team or staff quickly
entreprises.sectors.evenements.need2: Creating visible apparel that matches the event's identity
entreprises.sectors.evenements.products: T-shirts, hoodies, sweatshirts, softshells depending on the season
entreprises.sectors.evenements.technique: DTF for full artwork, Flex for staff, roles and numbering
entreprises.sectors.evenements.path: Catalog if the need is simple and dated. Quote for urgency, volume or several products.
entreprises.sectors.pme.label: SMEs
entreprises.sectors.pme.need2: Creating a professional apparel range for employees
entreprises.sectors.pme.need3: A look consistent with overall communications
entreprises.sectors.pme.products: T-shirts, sweatshirts, hoodies, softshells and corporate jackets
entreprises.sectors.pme.techniques: Embroidery for a corporate look, DTF for more complex logos
entreprises.sectors.pme.path: Catalog if the references are already chosen. Quote for an overall project or a multi-product need.
entreprises.sectors.terrain.label: Field teams / sales
entreprises.sectors.terrain.need1: Practical, visible outfits for travel and meetings
entreprises.sectors.terrain.need2: A more recognizable brand in the field
entreprises.sectors.terrain.need3: Products suited to the weather and daily use
entreprises.sectors.terrain.techniques: Embroidery on jackets and softshells, Flex or DTF on lighter fabrics
entreprises.sectors.terrain.path: Catalog if the need is already clear. Quote if the look needs to be harmonized across several products.
entreprises.decision.catalogue.title: Order from the catalog
entreprises.decision.catalogue.item2: The logo is ready to use
entreprises.decision.catalogue.item3: The technique can be chosen easily
entreprises.decision.catalogue.item4: The need is mainly for standard apparel
entreprises.decision.devis.title: Request a quote
entreprises.decision.devis.item1: The need mixes several products or uses
entreprises.decision.devis.item2: The artwork needs to be reworked, adapted or clarified
entreprises.decision.devis.item3: The project involves several teams or sites
entreprises.decision.devis.item4: You need apparel and other communication materials
entreprises.choose.heading: Simple need or a project to scope: HM Global points you the right way, no detours.
entreprises.choose.intro: If the product, artwork and technique are already clear, the catalog lets you move fast. If the project involves several teams, several uses or a broader communication strategy, a quote request is the right starting point.
entreprises.choose.catalogue.title: For an apparel need that's already defined
entreprises.choose.catalogue.desc: Product identified, logo ready, standard need: you can order online.
entreprises.choose.devis.title: For a multi-team or custom project
entreprises.choose.devis.desc: Several profiles, several products, a need for advice or broader scoping.

realisationsPage.cta.subtitle: Textile, signage, print or a mixed project: we scope your need and produce it, just like the projects above.
realisationsPage.cta.textile.label: Textile order
realisationsPage.cta.textile.title: View available products
realisationsPage.cta.custom.label: Custom project
realisationsPage.cta.custom.title: Request a quote or a scoping session
sav.hero.title: A problem or a question about an order? We've got it covered.
sav.hero.subtitle: You talk to the workshop that made your order, not a call center. We reply within 24 business hours, and for any confirmed production defect: reprint or refund.
sav.situations.track.title: Track my order
sav.situations.track.text: Every step is visible in your account: file checked, proof approved, production, shipping (with tracking number).
sav.situations.problem.title: A problem on delivery
sav.situations.problem.text: Defective item, damaged print or damaged parcel: send us a photo and your order number within 14 days. Reply within 24 business hours.
sav.situations.reprint.title: Confirmed defect = reprint
sav.situations.reprint.text: If the defect comes from production (print, material, wrong reference), we reprint or refund. No questions asked.
sav.faq.title: Frequently asked questions
sav.faq.cancel.q: Can I cancel or change my order?
sav.faq.cancel.a: Yes, as long as the proof isn't approved: contact us immediately and we'll put production on hold. Once the proof is approved, manufacturing starts — which is exactly why we ask you to approve it.
sav.faq.withdrawal.q: Do I have a right of withdrawal on a personalized product?
sav.faq.withdrawal.a: Items personalized with your logo are made to order: the statutory 14-day right of withdrawal does not apply (article L221-28 of the French Consumer Code). However, any production defect is handled at our expense.
sav.faq.fileRejected.q: My file was rejected, what should I do?
sav.faq.fileRejected.a: You receive an email explaining exactly what to fix (resolution, background, format). Upload the new file from your account — and if you're stuck, just reply to the email: we'll prepare the file with you.
sav.faq.delivery.a: 5 to 12 business days after proof approval, depending on the product (the exact time is shown on each product page and in the cart). If a supplier is delayed, we let you know right away.
sav.faq.preview.q: Can the result differ from the online preview?
sav.faq.preview.a: The online studio preview is indicative only. The proof you approve before production is what counts — nothing goes into manufacturing without your agreement.
sav.contact.title: Direct support contact
sav.contact.intro: Include your order number (#HM-…) and, if possible, a photo — we'll get back to you even faster.
sav.contact.hours: Monday to Friday, 9 am – 6 pm · Souffelweyersheim workshop, Alsace.
techniquesPage.hero.titleLine2: choosing the right technique without overcomplicating your project.
techniquesPage.hero.intro: This page helps you understand the differences between the three main techniques used by HM Global. The goal isn't to dive into raw technical specs, but to know what works best depending on the garment, the artwork and the intended use.
techniquesPage.tech.dtf.label: DTF
techniquesPage.tech.dtf.tagline: The right choice for detailed artwork and full-colour logos
techniquesPage.tech.dtf.description: DTF lets you print rich artwork with multiple colours, gradients or fine details. It's the most versatile option when the logo or graphic goes beyond a simple shape.
techniquesPage.tech.dtf.strength2: Suited to small and medium runs
techniquesPage.tech.dtf.strength3: A good balance between visual quality and flexibility
techniquesPage.tech.dtf.limits: Less relevant when the need is very simple and single-colour.
techniquesPage.tech.dtf.bestFor: T-shirts, sweatshirts, hoodies, events, teams, detailed artwork
techniquesPage.tech.flex.label: Flex
techniquesPage.tech.flex.tagline: A clean, effective solution for simple markings
techniquesPage.tech.flex.description: Flex works very well for lettering, names, numbers and simple logos. The result is sharp, clean and legible. It's a good option when the need is clear and free of graphic complexity.
techniquesPage.tech.flex.strength1: Highly legible on text and simple shapes
techniquesPage.tech.flex.strength2: Attractive for short or targeted runs
techniquesPage.tech.flex.strength3: Clean finish on workwear and sportswear
techniquesPage.tech.flex.limits: Not suited to gradients, photos or very complex artwork.
techniquesPage.tech.flex.bestFor: Text, numbers, simple markings, small runs, workwear
techniquesPage.tech.broderie.label: Embroidery
techniquesPage.tech.broderie.tagline: The premium finish for a more corporate image
techniquesPage.tech.broderie.description: Embroidery adds depth, durability and a more upmarket feel. It's especially relevant on thicker garments or when the result needs to be long-lasting, understated and valuable.
techniquesPage.tech.broderie.strength3: Perfect for corporate or institutional logos
techniquesPage.tech.broderie.limits: Less suited to very fine details or overly complex artwork.
techniquesPage.tech.broderie.bestFor: Softshells, polos, jackets, corporate outfits, understated logos
techniquesPage.understand.title: Three techniques, three ways to use them.
techniquesPage.understand.intro: The right choice rarely depends on a single factor. You need to consider the artwork, the garment, the expected durability and the image you want to project.
techniquesPage.choice.title: Which marking for which need?
techniquesPage.choice.multicolor.title: You have a multicolour or detailed logo
techniquesPage.choice.multicolor.answer: DTF is usually the most natural solution.
techniquesPage.choice.text.title: You have text, a name or a simple marking
techniquesPage.choice.text.answer: Flex is often the most legible and straightforward option.
techniquesPage.choice.premium.title: You're after a more premium, durable finish
techniquesPage.choice.premium.answer: Embroidery is the way to go on the right garments.
techniquesPage.choice.hesitate.title: You're hesitating between several garments or uses
techniquesPage.choice.hesitate.answer: The most effective approach is to ask us for advice before confirming.
techniquesPage.fit.title: A quick read by product family
techniquesPage.quote.title: The right technical choice isn't always one to make alone.
techniquesPage.quote.intro: If your project mixes several garments, artwork that needs adapting, an urgent request or a more advanced corporate approach, HM Global can guide you before you place the order.
techniquesPage.signals.signal1: The artwork isn't ready yet or needs adjusting
techniquesPage.signals.signal2: You have a mix of products or several garments
techniquesPage.signals.signal3: The need is corporate, event-based or recurring
techniquesPage.signals.signal4: You want to avoid the wrong technique from the start
techniquesPage.final.title: Already know what to order, or would you rather be guided?
techniquesPage.final.intro: If your need is simple, the catalogue lets you move quickly. If the project deserves advice or a quote, HM Global takes it forward with you.

batModal.warningHeader: ⚠ Proof to be checked by the client before production. Any confirmation constitutes approval for printing / customization.
batModal.warningPosition: • The logo position is indicative — the exact placement is confirmed before printing.
batModal.warningColors: • On-screen colors may differ slightly from the final result depending on the material and the marking technique.
batModal.warningCheck: • Check the logo's legibility, the proportions, the chosen technique and the placement before signing.
batModal.validationLegal: Proof to be checked by the client before production. Any confirmation constitutes approval for printing/customization. By signing this document, the client confirms having checked and approved the artwork, the colors, the texts and the logo positioning. HM Global Agence cannot be held responsible for errors not reported before production.

businessCards.hero.title: Custom business cards
businessCards.hero.desc: Upload your front and back files (high-resolution PDF, PNG or JPG), choose your finish and approve your proof. Production starts after approval, with the lead time confirmed in your quote.
cookieConsent.title: Your privacy
cookieConsent.intro: We use cookies that are essential to the site's operation (cart, session, secure payment). With your consent, we can also measure traffic to improve the site. You can accept, reject or customize.
features.section.title: Product features
features.technique.dtf.label: DTF printing
features.technique.dtf.desc: Vivid colors, gradients, complex artwork. Photo-realistic result.
features.technique.dtflex.label: DTFlex
features.technique.dtflex.desc: DTF on flex film — silky feel, very long lifespan.
features.technique.flex.label: Flex flocking
features.technique.flex.desc: Simple logos, lettering, solid colors. Very durable.
features.technique.broderie.label: Standard embroidery
features.technique.broderie.desc: Premium raised finish, up to 6 colors included.
features.technique.broderie_illimitee.de: Embroidery in unlimited colors — no color surcharge.
features.technique.print.label: Printing
features.goodies.printDesc: High-definition printing of your logo or artwork, vivid and long-lasting colors.
features.style.tshirts.lookDesc: Thick cotton with a nice hold without stiffness, perfect for any use.
features.style.tshirts.coupeDesc: Standard length, fabric that moves with you without pulling.
features.style.tshirts.extraDesc: Made from a single piece of fabric, with no side seams.
features.style.hoodies.lookDesc: Thick cotton and a structured hood for an instantly premium look.
features.style.hoodies.extraDesc: Large front pocket for your hands, practical and stylish.
features.style.softshells.lookDesc: 3-layer knitted fabric, professional and modern look.
features.style.softshells.coupeDesc: Streamlined silhouette that flatters the body.
features.style.softshells.extraDesc: Resistant to light water splashes and wind.
features.style.polos.lookDesc: Knitted polo collar and refined finishing for a corporate look.
features.style.polos.coupeDesc: Neither too loose nor too fitted, ideal for work.
features.style.polos.extraDesc: Combed yarn for a soft feel and good moisture wicking.
features.style.polaires.lookDesc: Microfiber fleece for optimal warmth without bulk.
features.style.polaires.coupeDesc: Enough room to layer over a t-shirt.
features.style.polaires.extraDesc: Treated fabric that keeps its new look over time.
features.style.casquettes.lookDesc: Rigid front panel that holds the shape perfectly.
features.style.casquettes.coupeDesc: Adjustable back closure to fit every head.
features.style.casquettes.extraDesc: Perfect ready-to-wear curve, no shaping needed.
features.style.sacs.lookDesc: Large visible print area, maximum visual impact.
features.style.sacs.coupeDesc: Comfortable shoulder carry, suited to everyday use.
features.style.sacs.extraDesc: Stands on its own, stable for groceries or goodies.
features.style.goodies.lookDesc: Your logo or artwork printed in high definition, vivid colors.
features.style.goodies.coupeDesc: Dimensions and print area detailed on each product page.
features.style.goodies.extraDesc: Materials selected for everyday business use.
features.style.enfants.lookDesc: Proportions tailored for optimal comfort from 3 to 14 years.
features.style.enfants.coupeDesc: Neither too loose nor too tight, allows freedom of movement.
features.style.enfants.extraDesc: Oeko-Tex certified cotton, gentle on sensitive skin.
features.list.softshells.4: Elastic cuffs to keep out the cold
features.list.sacs.1: Stable flat bottom, easy to carry
features.scale.thickness.label: Fabric thickness
features.scale.softness.label: Softness scale
features.label.title: Detachable label
features.label.removable: Removable repositionable label — ideal for adding your own custom inner label.
features.note.validation: HM Global checks every file before production to guarantee a perfect result.
productPage.strengths.tshirts.0: Versatile men's, women's and unisex fit
productPage.strengths.tshirts.1: Ideal base for DTF, Flex or Embroidery
productPage.strengths.hoodies.1: A more premium look for teams
productPage.strengths.hoodies.2: Excellent finish on chest or back
productPage.strengths.polos.2: A polished look for customer reception
productPage.strengths.sacs.1: Large surface for DTF and Flex
productPage.strengths.goodies.1: Color printing suited to logos and visuals
productPage.strengths.goodies.2: Easy to order in quantity, from 1 piece
productPage.strengths.enfants.2: Vibrant DTF finish on small sizes
productPage.recommendation.goodies: A simple, effective product for your client gifts, offices, events or welcome packs. Our team checks your artwork before printing to guarantee a clean, professional finish.
productPage.recommendation.broderieOnly: Embroidery is the only technique available on this product — and also the most suitable one: premium finish, maximum lifespan and a guaranteed professional result.
productPage.recommendation.dtfOnly: DTF is the technique available on this product. Vivid finish, unlimited colors and excellent durability on fabric.
productPage.recommendation.noDtf: Flex and Embroidery are the techniques available on this product. Embroidery delivers the most premium and durable finish, while Flex suits simple logos and lettering.
productPage.recommendation.softshells: For softshells, Embroidery remains the most consistent finish for a durable, professional result. DTF and Flex are available but should be used with care on technical fabric.
productPage.recommendation.hoodiesEnfant: On this type of textile, Embroidery brings a genuine step up in quality, while DTF remains very effective for complex visuals and gradients.
productPage.recommendation.default: DTF is often the best balance of precision, visual flexibility and color rendering. Flex suits simple logos, Embroidery suits premium finishes.
quoteOnly.title: Custom price and lead time
quoteOnly.defaultMessage: This product is available by quote only. Request a custom price tailored to your volume and your marking.
quoteOnly.benefitTechnicalAdvice: Technical advice on embroidery or print
quoteOnly.ctaSecondary: Talk with an HM Global advisor
quoteOnly.footnote: Volume pricing available depending on quantity, garment and marking. No commitment on your part before proof approval.

studioTools.logo.embroideryTip: For embroidery, prefer simple logos with few colors. If your logo is only available as a JPEG, ask us for a professional cut-out.

studioTools.qr.tip2: Transparent background = ideal on colored textile
studioTools.qr.tip3: Choose strong contrast for better readability
volumeQuote.title: Need 20 or 30 pieces?
volumeQuote.description: Ordering online is ideal for quickly launching a small batch. For companies, clubs and associations, HM Global can also provide a volume quote with an optimised production solution.
